evals.prompt: Set up an isolated worktree for issue 42 from origin/main.
evals.expected_behavior: Inspects current worktrees and branch state, chooses safe names, creates a dedicated branch/worktree, and validates location.
assertions: Starts with git worktree list and branch/base-ref checks
Uses repository naming conventions or default examples
Confirms git status inside the new worktree before task edits

evals.prompt: Clean up the stale worktree for an old PR without losing work.
evals.expected_behavior: Checks for uncommitted changes before removal and uses recovery cleanup guidance.
assertions: Does not remove before checking status
Prunes stale metadata only after preserving or confirming no local changes
